relative_path: Inventories - Reagents, samples, equipment/LN storage (Haartman institute - Tank 4, total space 91 boxes)/Return of Anniina cell lines-full_08082022.docx
full_text:
Reagents for cryopreservation (from ATCC instruction)

Complete growth medium supplemented with 60% (v/v) FBS and 10% (v/v) DMSO (ATCC 4-X). Avoid immersing vials into liquid nitrogen.

Frozen vial 19072022:

RPE FRESH p53-/- JIA 12/16

Rename: RPE FRESH p53-/- JB p3 (confluent in less than one week)

106 live cells, each, 94% viability

Frozen vial 20072022:

NA2 FRESH 12/16 (confluent in about two weeks)

Rename: NA2 JB p3

0.6x106 live cells, 93% viability

Frozen vial 25072022:

B40C2 3/19/19

Rename: B40 JB p3 (confluent in less than one week)

0.4x106 live cells, 95.3% viability

OA5 FRESH 11/28/18 (confluent in about two weeks)

Rename: OA5 JB p3

0.4x106 live cells, 88.9% viability

NAIII 6/21/18 (confluent in about two weeks)

Rename: NA3 JB p3

0.6x106 live cells, 86.5% viability

Frozen vial 07082022:

NA5 Fresh 11/28/18 (confluent in about two weeks)

Rename: NAV JB p4

0.9x106 live cells, 73.1% (although the counted viability is low, perhaps due to the reduced roundness of trypsinized cells, the cells look ok and grow well when passaged)

NA1 FRESH 12/01/18 (The cell line took a long to recover, confluent over three weeks)

Renamed: NAI JB P3

1.25X105 live cells 83.8% viability
